generated_oml:
instance MotorPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor position encoder mounted directly on the motor, streaming position data via MQTT protocol"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance GearboxPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder behind the gearbox, streaming position data via MQTT protocol"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor for measuring input current to the motor, streaming current data via MQTT protocol"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorPositionEncoder
    base:desc "Position data from motor encoder streamed via MQTT"
]

instance GearboxPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxPositionEncoder
    base:desc "Position data from gearbox encoder streamed via MQTT"
]

instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
    base:desc "Input current data from motor current sensor streamed via MQTT"
]

instance Measured_PositionMotor_Data : DTDFVocab:Data [
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink_Tool, Dashboard_Tool
    base:desc "Measured position data from motor encoder"
]

instance Measured_PositionGearbox_Data : DTDFVocab:Data [
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink_Tool, Dashboard_Tool
    base:desc "Measured position data from gearbox encoder"
]

instance Measured_InputCurrent_Data : DTDFVocab:Data [
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink_Tool, Dashboard_Tool
    base:desc "Measured input current data"
]

instance Derived_Torque_Data : DTDFVocab:Data [
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted, MotorCurrentDataTransmitted, GearboxPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink_Tool, Dashboard_Tool
    base:desc "Derived torque data from dynamics models using manufacturer specifications"
]

instance Derived_AngularVelocity_Data : DTDFVocab:Data [
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted, GearboxPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink_Tool, Dashboard_Tool
    base:desc "Derived angular velocity data from dynamics models using manufacturer specifications"
]

instance AAS_Metadata : DTDFVocab:Data [
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AAS_Tool, Dashboard_Tool
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell metadata for semantic interoperability"
]

instance SysML_BDD_Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysML_Tool
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for structural modeling of the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance SysML_IBD_Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysML_Tool
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for structural modeling of the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance Simulink_CoulombViscous_Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink_Tool
    base:desc "Simulink model for Coulomb-Viscous friction"
]

instance Simulink_Stribeck_Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink_Tool
    base:desc "Simulink model for Stribeck friction"
]

instance Simulink_Dahl_Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink_Tool
    base:desc "Simulink model for Dahl friction"
]

instance Simulink_LuGre_Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink_Tool
    base:desc "Simulink model for LuGre friction"
]

instance Dynamics_Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink_Tool
    base:desc "Dynamics model for deriving torque and angular velocity using manufacturer specifications"
]

instance SysML_Tool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for model-based systems engineering"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentification_Service, Visualization_Service
]

instance Simulink_Tool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink for simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentification_Service
]

instance AAS_Tool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells for semantic interoperability"
    DTDFVocab:enables Visualization_Service
]

instance MQTT_Tool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT for real-time data streaming"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentification_Service, Visualization_Service
]

instance Siemens_SINUMERIK840Dsl_Controller : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for robot control"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentification_Service
]

instance Dashboard_Tool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization tools"
    DTDFVocab:enables Visualization_Service
]

instance FrictionIdentification_Service : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous multi-physics-aware identification of joint friction using white-box (analytical) and black-box (data-driven) models combined with live operational data"
    DTDFVocab:provides Insight_JointFrictionParameters
]

instance Visualization_Service : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visualization of integrated data traces in a unified dashboard to enhance robot motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:provides Insight_OptimizationFromComparison
]

instance Insight_JointFrictionParameters : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identification of joint friction parameters for real-time control adjustments to improve motion accuracy"
]

instance Insight_OptimizationFromComparison : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights derived from comparison of simulated and measured data to optimize robot performance"
]

instance System_MABIMAX100_Axis1 : DTDFVocab:SystemUnderStudy [
    base:desc "First axis of the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot from MABI Robotic AG, consisting of a permanent magnet synchronous motor, gearwheel, and cycloidal gearbox, with a maximum working range of [-90°, 90°] and maximum speed of 75°/s"
]

instance Environment_MABIMAX100_Axis1 : DTDFVocab:DigitalTwin [
    base:contains System_MABIMAX100_Axis1, MotorPositionEncoder, GearboxPositionEncoder, MotorCurrentSensor, SysML_BDD_Model, SysML_IBD_Model, Simulink_CoulombViscous_Model, Simulink_Stribeck_Model, Simulink_Dahl_Model, Simulink_LuGre_Model, Dynamics_Model, AAS_Metadata, FrictionIdentification_Service, Visualization_Service, Siemens_SINUMERIK840Dsl_Controller, SysML_Tool, Simulink_Tool, AAS_Tool, MQTT_Tool, Dashboard_Tool
]

instance TwinningProcess_MABI : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Purpose-driven methodology with four steps: problem identification (friction detection in first axis), asset and model analysis (SysML structure), use of simulation models (Simulink friction models), and data identification (sensor data and derived traces), following the Digital Shadow Reference Model [15]."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data streaming and processing for immediate friction model identification and motion control adjustments, with live measurements synchronized to the physical system's operation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Integration of the physical robot's first axis (motor, gearwheel, cycloidal gearbox), sensor data streams, SysML structural models, Simulink behavioral models, Asset Administration Shells (AAS), and a unified dashboard for visualization, forming a passive digital shadow with one-way data flow."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated, utilizing live operational data from the physical robot during active use for friction analysis and motion control improvement."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation through deviation analysis between simulated data (from friction models) and measured data to identify friction loss, with multi-physics-aware integration of white-box and black-box models for enhanced accuracy."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time streaming of sensor data (current, position, velocity, acceleration) from the physical robot to the digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for semantic interoperability and SysML for model-based systems engineering as per Industry 4.0 standards."
]
